notes:
1to1 Call Teardown Hotfix

  • Decline now exits cleanly: If the other side declines, you briefly see Declined and the call closes automatically instead of hanging in waiting state.
  • Nudges clean up correctly: Return calls now clear stale nudge entries, so old call requests do not come back after the call ends.
  • Stability safeguards: Added extra client and server cleanup protections for invitation race conditions.
